highlights.text: Kuala Lumpur (3N) → Genting Highlands (2N) discovery circuit
KL Tower, Petronas Towers & Batu Caves exploration
Genting SkyWorlds theme park & highland leisure
Putrajaya administrative capital & farewell in KL

itinerary.title: Malaysia Discovery Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Kuala Lumpur • Batu Caves • Genting Highlands • Putrajaya
itinerary.overview: Discover the rich heritage and modern wonders of Malaysia with TRAGUIN's curated family itinerary. A flawless blend of city exploration and highland adventure — from KL Tower and Petronas Towers to Genting theme parks and Putrajaya's stunning architecture.
itinerary.seo_title: MY-002 | Malaysia Discovery Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Malaysia family package (MY-002): Kuala Lumpur, Batu Caves, Genting Highlands, Putrajaya, and SkyWorlds theme park.

days.title: Arrival in Kuala Lumpur
days.description: Arrive in Kuala Lumpur. Private TRAGUIN transfer to premium hotel. Evening breathtaking city skyline views from KL Tower observation deck.
activities: Sightseeing Included: KL Tower observation deck, city orientation
Meals Included: Welcome arrangements on arrival

days.title: Kuala Lumpur Exploration
days.description: Visit world-famous Petronas Twin Towers and iconic Batu Caves. Shopping and local food in vibrant city center with insights into Malaysia's cultural diversity.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Petronas Towers, Batu Caves, Merdeka Square

days.title: Genting Highlands Adventure
days.description: Scenic Awana SkyWay cable car ride with breathtaking landscapes. Time in integrated indoor and outdoor theme parks.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Awana SkyWay, indoor/outdoor theme parks

days.title: Genting Highlands Leisure
days.description: Full day dedicated to leisure and adventure at Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park. Shopping malls, cinemas, and cool mountain weather.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Genting SkyWorlds Theme Park

days.title: Putrajaya & Return to KL
days.description: Visit Putrajaya administrative capital with stunning architecture including Putrajaya Mosque. Transfer back to Kuala Lumpur for final evening of shopping and dining.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Putrajaya Mosque, Prime Minister's Office view

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final breakfast before private TRAGUIN transfer to KL International Airport, completing your Malaysia discovery family tour.

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked premium family hotels across Kuala Lumpur and Genting
Private luxury van ground transfers throughout
Petronas Towers, Batu Caves, Genting theme parks, and Putrajaya sightseeing
Awana SkyWay cable car and Genting SkyWorlds theme park access
TRAGUIN 24/7 dedicated on-ground family concierge support
International airfare and Malaysia entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
